task_completion.description: Create a new case in Autopsy with the specified name and number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing the active case name 'Peer_Review_Audit_2024' and case number 'INV-PRA-006' in the title bar or case properties.

task_completion.description: Add the target disk image to the Autopsy case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data source 'ntfs_undel.dd' is visible in the Autopsy tree view under 'Data Sources'.

task_completion.description: Run the File Type Identification and Hash Lookup ingest modules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy ingest module configuration screen showing 'File Type Identification' and 'Hash Lookup' selected, or results in the tree view (e.g., 'Views -> File Types') indicating these modules were run.

task_completion.description: Generate the corrected peer review report with the required format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation/content of '/home/ga/Reports/peer_review_report.txt' containing the exact headers requested (PEER REVIEW REPORT, CASE, CASE_NUMBER, IMAGE, REVIEWER, FILESYSTEM_TYPE, etc.) and the identified errors.

task_completion.description: Generate the error summary file with the required pipe-separated format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation/content of '/home/ga/Reports/error_summary.txt' with lines formatted as 'FIELD|PRELIMINARY_VALUE|CORRECT_VALUE|DISCREPANCY_TYPE'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Autopsy GUI to analyze the disk image as instructed, rather than relying solely on CLI tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Autopsy application open and being interacted with to find the file counts and largest file.

integrity.description: Agent actually read the preliminary findings to perform the comparison.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal (cat/less), or file viewer showing the contents of '/home/ga/evidence/preliminary_findings.txt'.

integrity.description: Agent saved the reports to the correct file paths rather than just printing them to the console.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths '/home/ga/Reports/peer_review_report.txt' and '/home/ga/Reports/error_summary.txt' are visible in the text editor's save dialog, title bar, or terminal commands (e.g., nano, vim, or echo redirects).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified Case Name: Peer_Review_Audit_2024. Verified Case Number: INV-PRA-006. Disk Image: /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Target Reports: /home/ga/Reports/peer_review_report.txt and /home/ga/Reports/error_summary.txt. CRITICAL EVALUATION NOTE: The automated verifier has known bugs. It expects TOTAL_FILES = 8 and DELETED_FILES = 3 (due to a parsing bug skipping root files), while true counts are ~27 and 8+. It also expects LARGEST_FILE_NAME to be 'tracking.log' (ignoring NTFS system files like $BadClus:$Bad). Do not penalize the agent if it reports the true Autopsy counts/files instead of the buggy verifier's expected values. Accept either as long as they are derived from the tool.
